fields.name: raMean
fields.description: Right ascension from single epoch detections (weighted mean) in equinox J2000 at the mean epoch given by epochMean

fields.name: decMean
fields.description: Declination from single epoch detections (weighted mean) in equinox J2000 at the mean epoch given by epochMean

fields.name: raMeanErr
fields.description: Right ascension standard deviation from single epoch detections

fields.name: decMeanErr
fields.description: Declination standard deviation from single epoch detections

fields.name: epochMean
fields.description: Modified Julian Date of the mean epoch corresponding to raMean, decMean (weighted mean of the PS1 observation epochs)

fields.name: nDetections
fields.description: Number of single epoch detections in all filters

fields.name: qualityFlag
fields.description: Subset of objInfoFlag denoting whether this object is real or a likely false positive (ObjectQualityFlags bitmask)

fields.name: objInfoFlag
fields.description: Information flag bitmask indicating details of the photometry (ObjectInfoFlags)

fields.name: gMeanPSFMag
fields.description: Mean PSF magnitude from g filter detections (MeanObject table)

fields.name: gMeanPSFMagErr
fields.description: Error in mean PSF magnitude from g filter detections

fields.name: rMeanPSFMag
fields.description: Mean PSF magnitude from r filter detections

fields.name: iMeanPSFMag
fields.description: Mean PSF magnitude from i filter detections

fields.name: iMeanPSFMagErr
fields.description: Error in mean PSF magnitude from i filter detections

fields.name: zMeanPSFMag
fields.description: Mean PSF magnitude from z filter detections

fields.name: yMeanPSFMag
fields.description: Mean PSF magnitude from y filter detections

fields.name: iMeanKronMag
fields.description: Mean Kron (1980) magnitude from i filter detections
